name: agent-builder
description: Agent Builder Demo — natural-language generation of OpenJiuwen-based Agent/Workflow Python projects.

scripts.test: npm run build:contracts && npm run test:contracts && npm run test:api && npm run test:web && npm run test:python
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:contracts && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace @agent-builder/api run build && npm --workspace @agent-builder/web run build
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:contracts && npm --workspace @agent-builder/api run start:dev
